title: G.S.R. 647(E): Environment (Protection) Fourth Amendment Rules, 2002
text: REGD NO. D L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY FART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 426 | NEW DELHI, SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 14, 2002/BHADRA 23,1924 2899 GI/2002 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZFTTE OF INDTA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SI- C 3 (i)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13 th September, 2002 G.S.R. 647(E).—;Ui exercise of powers conferred by Sections 6 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, ) 986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, namely-- 1 (1) VHcse rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Fourth Amendment Rules, 2002. (2) They shall coihe into force on the dale of their publication in the Official Gazelle. 2 In Schedule I \o the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, against serial number 59, in column 2, for the words "Bagassc-fired Boilers'". I he words and brackets " Agriculture residue fired Boilers (including bagasse)" shah" be substituted, |F.No Q. 15O17/3O/2OO2-CPW] C. VISWANATH, Jt. Secy.
